issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases in its code examples.

scenarios.name: Add Fireworks streaming chat to a Next.js app
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the OpenAI SDK with baseURL https://api.fireworks.ai/inference/v1 and a fully-qualified model id like accounts/fireworks/models/llama-v3p3-70b-instruct with stream:true as documented; baseline often invents a fireworks-only SDK or uses bare model names that won't resolve on the platform.

scenarios.name: Tool-calling agent that returns structured JSON
scenarios.rationale: Treatment selects firefunction-v2 for tool use and uses response_format with a JSON schema (sentiment/confidence/keywords pattern) as the skill documents; baseline defaults to a generic 70B model and free-form prompt JSON, missing the Fireworks-specific function-calling-optimized model and schema-constrained output.
